description: DB integration: marketing migrations apply cleanly on a fresh tenant; all marketing tables exist, tenant-scoped, RLS enforced (cross-tenant reads return nothing)
DB guard: FK-direction check — schema inspection proves no core table references any marketing table (module drop-safe); marketing interaction types + permissions seeded

DB integration: capture happy path — form submission creates marketing contact linked to contacts, records form_submitted interaction with campaign attribution, and produces an inbound-lead opportunity_suggestion with attribution in generator_context
DB integration: accepting the inbound-lead suggestion creates an opportunity carrying campaign/content source attribution; marketing engagements become visible on the opportunity timeline

DB integration: sequence send loop — enroll contact, advance clock past step delay, send job emits email via outbound email abstraction, enrollment advances to next step, email_sent interaction recorded and linked
Guard: suppressed address receives zero sequence sends even when actively enrolled and steps are due (send job skips + marks enrollment stopped)
Guard: unsubscribe endpoint immediately suppresses, stops all active enrollments for the address, and suppression survives contact deletion + re-import

DB integration: post state machine — scheduled target flips to awaiting-manual-publish at due time (job re-run idempotent, no duplicate transitions/interactions), mark-published records permalink + published_by, stale target auto-expires after grace period

API integration: agent publish loop — API token with marketing:manage discovers endpoints via registry, lists due posts, fetches rendered content, marks published with permalink; same calls with marketing:read-only (or flag off) are denied
Integration: email open (pixel) and click (redirect) events flow to PostHog and are recorded as email_opened/email_clicked interactions linked to the campaign/sequence
Guard: capture endpoint rejects malformed/hostile payloads, enforces rate limit, and cannot be used to enumerate the suppression list

UI smoke: marketing nav hidden with flag off; with flag on, calendar/queue/content/campaigns/sequences/forms/channels render and core flows (create campaign → content → post → queue) complete without errors

DB integration: awaiting-manual-publish target appears in user activities aggregation with correct title/due date/link (overdue → HIGH priority); disappears after mark-published; absent when marketing_module flag is off
